awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome alfred workflows
awesomeList.description: A curated list of awesome alfred workflows

nodes.itemHTML: • iMessage 2FAstars43 - Find two-factor authentication codes in your recent iMessage messages.
• Todoiststars256 - Add tasks to Todoist.
• Momentstars60 - Advanced time utility, inspired by moment.js.
• SSH iTermstars4 - Query ~/.ssh/config and open ssh host with iTerm badge.
• Lorem Ipsumstars26 - Generate lorem ipsum(...) text from Alfred.
• Gitmojistars26 - Search for Gitmojis easily.
• Spotify Mini Player - Take full control of your Spotify library.
• VPN Managerstars128 - Control Tunnelblick and Viscosity OpenVPN connections.
• Source Treestars94 - List, search, and open Source Tree repositories.
• I Sheet You Notstars53 - Generate your own workflows from Excel spreadsheets.
• Redditstars160 - Search and browse subreddits and hot posts within Alfred.
• AppScriptsstars58 - Search and run JXA/AppleScripts for the active application.
• Password Generatorstars209 - Configurable offline password generator.
• Convertstars577 - Offline conversion of units and (crypto)currencies.
• Fakeumstars201 - Generate all kinds of test data.
• Git Reposstars246 - Search and open the Git repos on your system.
• MailTostars55 - Quickly compose emails to your contacts and contact groups.
• Safari Assistantstars171 - Browse, open & manipulate Safari bookmarks, history and tabs. Customizable with your own scripts.
• Google Calendar Viewstars152 - View your Google Calendar events.
• PDF Toolsstars68 - Optimize, encrypt and manipulate PDF files.
• Thingsstars281 - Interact with Things 3 using Alfred.
• Alfred-Workflowstars2.4k - Python Library for writing Alfred workflows.
• Ctwise Alfred Workflowsstars445 - Workflows from the Github user "ctwise".
• Vítor Galvão’s Alfred Workflowsstars1.6k - Workflows from the Github user "vitorgalvao".
• Fuzzy Searchstars70 - Add fuzzy search to any Script Filter.
• Alfystars2k - Node.js library to create Alfred workflows with ease.
• AwGostars582 - Full-featured library for Go to build lightning-fast workflows in a jiffy.
• Packagiststars21 - Search for PHP packages with Packagist.
• Kaomoji - Find relevant kaomoji from text.
• Fkillstars426 - Fabulously search and kill processes.
• WebScreenshot - Take screenshots directly to imgur.
• AppFreeze - Pauses and resumes execution of the frontmost app.
• BugNot - Get logins from bugmenot.
• IncognitoClone - Opens Chrome’s frontmost tab in an incognito window.
• TemporaryEmail - Get a temporary email inbox from Teleosaurs Mail.
• OneUpdater - Minimal Configuration method in adding auto-updating to your workflow.
• Swift Windows Switcherstars257 - Switches between open windows and a browser (Safari/Chrome) tabs.
• Dash - Allows you to query Dash for Developer Documentation.
• DevDocsstars533 - An Alternative to Dash. Allows you query devdocs.io for documentation.
• JetBrainsstars335 - Open project with one of JetBrains' products.
• Pandoctorstars29 - Alfred interface to pandoc, a tool that allows to convert between text formats (Markdown, LaTeX, DOC, DOCX, ...).
• Scientific Workflowstars88 - Workflows that are useful for scientists: e.g. LaTeX, importing references in bibtex.
• Emoji Snippet Pack - Snippet Pack for Emojis.
• Laravel Forgestars45 - alForge, Open and run commands on Laravel Forge.
• ngstars44 - Search through the angular.io documentation.
• TemporaryMute - Mutes the volume of their computer for a specified duration of time.
• Keyboard Maestrostars328 - Execute Keyboard Maestro macros from Alfred.
• SSHstars81 - Autocompletes SSH sessions based on ~/.ssh/known_hosts, ~/.ssh/config and /etc/hosts
• Finder New itemstars25 - Swiftly create new items in Finder with support for templates.
• mdistars38 - Find Material Design Iconsstars42.8k.
• Githubstars2.4k - GitHub command bar, similiar to the command bar in Github.
• npmsstars315 - Search for npm packages with npms.io.
• hlstars83 - Syntax highlight code in the clipboard.
• Emojstars329 - Find relevant emoji from text.
• Unicode Text Searchstars164 - Search for Unicode Symbols.
• DOIToolsstars6 - Tools to resolve, open, shorten DOI numbers and even convert them to bibtex.
• AlfredWorkflow.com - List of Alfred Workflows.
• Random MAC - Assigns a random MAC address to en0 (e.g. for free wifi).
• Skim remote - Controls the Skim PDF Viewer remotely from Alfred.
• Keyluestars41 - Key Clue, Menu Bar and Keyboard Maestro Hot Key Search
• Funnel - Funnel selected text or a file through various filters.
• TerminalFinderstars843 - Alfred workflow to open current Finder window in Terminal/iTerm and vice versa.
• Encode / Decodestars434 - Transform your query strings through base64, html, url, and utf-8 encode/decode.
• HTML Entity Lookupstars29 - Search for entity characters based on how they look or by name.
• Slack - Alfred workflow to interact, and perform various functions with the service Slack.
• LastPass Vault Managerstars121 - A workflow to interact with a LastPass vault.
• Packal - The biggest place to find Workflows.
• Font Awesomestars730 - Quickly look up font awesome icons and add the desired one to your clipboard.
• Adium - Adium workflow to chat with people on your list.
• caniusestars382 - Caniuse.com workflow to query HTML / CSS support.
• CDNstars65 - Check which CDNs a package is hosted on.
• Colors - Convert color formats & access the OS X color panel.
• Package Managersstars596 - Package Repo Search.
• VagrantUPstars41 - List and control Vagrant environments with Alfred2.
• Copy Paths to Clipboardstars83 - Copy Current File Paths to Clipboard as POSIX, HFS, or File URLs.
• Network Info - Display ip addresses or mac addresses for all network interfaces.
